main.description: Update livestream metadata on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'livestream.manage' permission. Updates a place.stream.livestream record in the streamer's repository.

livestreamUri.description: The AT-URI of the livestream record to update.

uri.description: The AT-URI of the updated livestream record.

cid.description: The CID of the updated livestream record.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to update livestream metadata for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.

errors.name: RecordNotFound
errors.description: The specified livestream record does not exist.
